tests.description: Verify the embedded HTMX bytes match the lock-derived digest and that mutated bytes, stale digest, duplicate source, or weakened CSP fail.
tests.testTitle: TestHTMXAssetMatchesLockedDigestAndMutatedBytesOrWeakenedCSPFail

tests.description: Serve exact source-locked bytes and preserve one existing read interaction and one existing mutation interaction.
tests.testTitle: TestSharedHTMXAssetServesExactBytesAndSupportsReadAndMutationCanaries

tests.description: Assert immutable asset headers, strict CSP, and absence of the external HTMX source through the real server-rendered stack.
tests.testTitle: shared HTMX asset has immutable headers strict CSP and no external source

tests.description: Load same-origin HTMX and exercise one read and one mutation interaction in the real browser.
tests.testTitle: same-origin HTMX loads and one read plus one mutation interaction remains operable

tests.description: Prove the shared head exposes one source-locked version and emits no CSP or integrity console errors across the browser suite.
tests.testTitle: shared head exposes exactly one source-locked HTMX version without console CSP or integrity errors

tests.description: Validate semantic form markup, one typed model, SearchEngine call count, complete-page and fragment rendering, and state exclusivity.
tests.testTitle: TestSearchSemanticFormAndTypedFullPageFragmentStateMatrix

tests.description: Record the pre-fix inert baseline and then prove native submission calls SearchEngine once with typed outcomes.
tests.testTitle: TestBaselineSearchWasInertBeforeFixAndNowCallsEngineOnceWithTypedOutcomes

tests.description: Exercise baseline POST results, validation, empty, failure, and unauthorized complete documents on the real stack.
tests.testTitle: baseline POST search returns complete results validation empty failure and unauthorized documents

tests.description: Use a real session and JavaScript-disabled browser to prove pointer submission works and blank input performs no search-domain work while HTTP validation is permitted.
tests.testTitle: pointer search works with JavaScript disabled and blank input performs no search-domain work

tests.description: Keep baseline no-match, typed failure, and expired-session browser states mutually exclusive.
tests.testTitle: baseline no-match failure and expired-session states remain mutually exclusive

tests.description: Prove the enhancement observes lifecycle but cannot submit requests or expose raw query data.
tests.testTitle: TestSearchEnhancementObservesLifecycleButCannotSubmitOrLeakQuery

tests.description: Record duplicate-capable legacy triggers and then prove form enhancement calls Search once and preserves degraded truth.
tests.testTitle: TestOldInputAndEnterTriggersCanDuplicateButFormEnhancementCallsSearchOnceAndPreservesDegradedState

tests.description: Return one typed result or degraded HTMX fragment with real status and provenance.
tests.testTitle: HTMX request returns one typed result or degraded fragment with real status and provenance

tests.description: Observe one actual POST for Enter and one actual POST for pointer, followed by live results.
tests.testTitle: Enter and pointer each issue exactly one real search request and render live results

tests.description: Replace stale state across retry, timeout, network, server, and degraded transitions without session or privacy drift.
tests.testTitle: retry timeout network server and degraded transitions replace stale state without session or privacy drift

tests.description: Reject browser helpers with interception, auth injection, bailout, or private live-region content.
tests.testTitle: TestSearchBrowserHelpersForbidInterceptionAuthInjectionBailoutAndPrivateAnnouncements

tests.description: Record zero browser requests before repair and prove all owned states are reachable after repair.
tests.testTitle: TestPreFixBrowserSendsZeroRequestWhenHTMXBlockedAndPostFixAllOwnedStatesRemainReachable

tests.description: Keep real Search API and server-rendered outcome matrices coherent.
tests.testTitle: real Search API and server-rendered outcome matrix remains coherent

tests.description: Prove real Search remains operable, announced, and non-overlapping with enhancement enabled and disabled.
tests.testTitle: real Search remains operable announced and non-overlapping with enhancement enabled and disabled

tests.description: Preserve authentication, navigation, shared HTMX, and broader product journeys after the Search repair.
tests.testTitle: Search repair preserves auth navigation shared HTMX and broader product journeys
